ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race of the patient */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marital status of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the patient record was last updated */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital where the patient is being treated */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary doctor of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Patient's email address */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Patient's social security number (encrypted) */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Patient's insurance provider */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Patient's insurance policy number */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "t_stages" (
  "t_stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each T stage */,
  "t_stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the T stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the T stage */,
  "code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the T stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("t_stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "n_stages" (
  "n_stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each N stage */,
  "n_stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the N stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the N stage */,
  "code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the N stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("n_stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages_6th" (
  "stage_6th_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each 6th edition stage */,
  "stage_6th_name" TEXT /* Name of the 6th edition stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the 6th edition stage */,
  "code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the 6th edition stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_6th_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade */,
  "code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "a_stages" (
  "a_stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each A stage */,
  "a_stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the A stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the A stage */,
  "code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the A stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("a_stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tumor_sizes" (
  "tumor_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tumor size */,
  "tumor_size_mm" INTEGER /* Size of the tumor in millimeters */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tumor size */,
  "code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the tumor size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tumor_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hormone_statuses" (
  "hormone_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hormone status */,
  "hormone_type" TEXT /* Type of hormone (Estrogen or Progesterone) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status (Positive or Negative) */,
  "code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the hormone status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hormone_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_nodes_examined" (
  "regional_node_examined_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "number_examined" INTEGER /* Number of regional nodes examined */,
  "code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the number of regional nodes examined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regional_node_examined_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_nodes_positive" (
  "regional_node_positive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "number_positive" INTEGER /* Number of regional nodes positive */,
  "code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the number of regional nodes positive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regional_node_positive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_periods" (
  "survival_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival period */,
  "months" INTEGER /* Number of months the patient survived */,
  "code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the survival period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survival_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the survival status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survival status */,
  "code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the survival status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_tumor_details" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "t_stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the T stage of the tumor */,
  "n_stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the N stage of the tumor */,
  "stage_6th_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the 6th edition stage of the tumor */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grade of the tumor */,
  "a_stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the A stage of the tumor */,
  "tumor_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the tumor */,
  "hormone_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hormone status of the tumor */,
  "regional_node_examined_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the number of regional nodes examined */,
  "regional_node_positive_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the number of regional nodes positive */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "surgery_date" TEXT /* Date of any surgical procedures */,
  "initial_treatment_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., chemotherapy, radiation) */,
  "treatment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the treatment in days */,
  "response_to_treatment" TEXT /* Patient's response to treatment (e.g., Complete Response, Partial Response) */,
  "recurrence_date" TEXT /* Date of any cancer recurrence */,
  "next_follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the next follow-up appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_tumor_details_regional_node_examined_id FOREIGN KEY ("regional_node_examined_id") REFERENCES regional_nodes_examined ("regional_node_examined_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_tumor_details_tumor_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("tumor_size_id") REFERENCES tumor_sizes ("tumor_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_tumor_details_regional_node_positive_id FOREIGN KEY ("regional_node_positive_id") REFERENCES regional_nodes_positive ("regional_node_positive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_tumor_details_t_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("t_stage_id") REFERENCES t_stages ("t_stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_tumor_details_hormone_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("hormone_status_id") REFERENCES hormone_statuses ("hormone_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_tumor_details_n_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("n_stage_id") REFERENCES n_stages ("n_stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_tumor_details_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_tumor_details_stage_6th_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_6th_id") REFERENCES stages_6th ("stage_6th_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_tumor_details_a_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("a_stage_id") REFERENCES a_stages ("a_stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_survival" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "survival_period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survival period of the patient */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survival status of the patient */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death if the patient has passed away */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death if the patient has passed away */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_survival_survival_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("survival_period_id") REFERENCES survival_periods ("survival_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_survival_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES survival_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password for user login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Doctor, Nurse, Researcher, Administrator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., View Patient Data, Edit Patient Data) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action (e.g., Created Patient, Updated Patient) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the action occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
